title: InVivo Biosystems
html: Stub. Oregon-based biotech making instruments to study gene-specific behavior in C. elegans roundworms. Yahir's high-school visit to their lab is the founding moment of his AI interest (2020 09 28 experience qb question) — "I saw AI in full swing... the kindling of my curiosity."

related.label: QuestBridge Experience Question — AI / microalgae intellectual-curiosity essay
